name: NEW_ENTRANTS_BY_PATHWAY_2024
description: New entrants by pathway in 2024. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (pw:Pathway {name: $pathway})<-[:IN_PATHWAY]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WITH a, min(y.year) AS first_year, count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN y.year = $year THEN p END) AS patent_count_in_year
WHERE first_year = $year AND patent_count_in_year > 0
RETURN a.name AS assignee, first_year, patent_count_in_year
ORDER BY patent_count_in_year DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: In 2024, within target-pair combinations related to the MET receptor recycling pathway, which companies were new entrants?
In 2024, within target-pair combinations related to the FasL/ CD95L signaling pathway, which companies were new entrants?
In 2024, within target-pair combinations related to the Downstream signaling events of B Cell Receptor (BCR) pathway, which companies were new entrants?
